General.Name: South China Financial Holdings Ltd
General.Description: South China Financial Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides various financial services in Hong Kong and Mainland China. The company operates through Broking; Trading and Investment; Margin Financing and Money Lending; Asset and Wealth Management; Corporate Advisory and Underwriting; Property Investment; and Other Business segments. The company engages in the securities, commodities, and futures contracts brokerage activities; trading of securities, forex, bullion, and futures contracts; and provision of corporate advisory and underwriting services, insurance broking and asset management, and clearing and custodian services, as well as margin financing, mortgage and personal loan financing, and finance lease operations. It is involved in the property investment and share dealing activities; woods plantation and carbon trading related operations; research publication activities; and provision of management services. The company was formerly known as South China Brokerage Company Limited and changed its name to South China Financial Holdings Limited in February 2007. South China Financial Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1988 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Bank of China Tower, Central, Hong Kong
